text: The iron in your blood? It was forged in a dying star. Stellar nucleosynthesis happens inside stars, where lighter elements fuse into heavier ones. But when these stars explode as supernovae, they scatter these elements across the universe. That’s right! Elements like iron, carbon, and oxygen all originate from these cosmic events. So next time you look at the night sky, remember: you’re made of stardust! Curious for more cosmic secrets? Like and follow for a journey through the universe!
